2.headline: Robots are moving from demos to payroll
2.body: Two-thirds of organizations now rank physical AI as a top priority. The next labor gap may be filled by machines that can actually do the work.

2.headline: The factory floor is getting an AI upgrade
2.body:
> Autonomous robots are now a boardroom priority
> Humanoids are still years away
> Real gains start with existing machines

2.headline: Physical AI is no longer a side project
2.body: 66% of organizations are prioritizing autonomous robots to tackle labor shortages and unlock new industrial capabilities.
